title: Kitty HUD
description: Hearts with kitty ears, fish hunger bar, and more!
body: Hearts with kitty ears, salmon hunger bar, and more! Salmon hunger bar is compatible with appleskin. This will override most of your HUD, including hearts, hunger, air bubbles, and armor bar, so it is recommended to place this above any other HUD changing resource packs. If you have a specific version you want me to make a verson for, put something in the issue tracker and I'll make one at some point
